coverage_result.section: Section I — Own Damage (Accidental External Means)
coverage_result.note: The damage to the vehicle was caused by an accidental external means, which is covered under this clause.
The vehicle was stationary in traffic, not in transit, so this clause does not apply.
While the incident is covered, verification is needed to confirm if consumables were replaced as a direct consequence of the damage.

coverage_result.section: Add-on — Personal Accident Cover for Passengers
coverage_result.note: There were no injuries to passengers, so this clause does not apply.

exclusion_result.name: Driving without a valid and effective driving licence
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The driver has submitted a valid driving license, so this exclusion does not appear to apply.

exclusion_result.name: Depreciation on rubber, nylon, plastic parts, tyres and tubes
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The absence of a Zero Depreciation endorsement means depreciation on damaged parts may not be covered.

exclusion_result.name: Mechanical or electrical breakdown
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident involved a collision, but any mechanical failure related to the damage could be relevant.

exclusion_result.name: Consequential or indirect loss
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: Any indirect financial loss resulting from the accident may not be covered under this exclusion.

exclusion_result.name: War, invasion and nuclear risk
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: This exclusion does not appear to apply as the incident is a road accident.

exclusion_result.name: Driving under influence of alcohol, drugs or intoxicants
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no indication of intoxication, but verification is needed to confirm the driver's state.

exclusion_result.name: Normal wear and tear and gradual deterioration
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: Damage from wear and tear is not covered, but the incident involved a collision.

exclusion_result.name: Tyre and tube damage when vehicle body is undamaged
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The vehicle sustained damage, so this exclusion may not apply.

exclusion_result.name: Damage occurring outside the geographical coverage area (India)
exclusion_result.clause_ref: Policy Schedule — Geographical Area of Cover
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident occurred within India, so this exclusion does not apply.

exclusion_result.name: Vehicle driven by person not authorised by insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The driver is not mentioned as being unauthorized, but verification is needed.

exclusion_result.name: Use of vehicle beyond the limitations of use stated in the policy
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident description does not indicate commercial use, but verification is needed.

exclusion_result.name: Use of vehicle for racing or speed testing
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident does not involve racing, so this exclusion does not apply.

exclusion_result.name: Loss or damage intentionally caused by the insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no indication of intentional damage by the insured, so this exclusion does not apply.

waiting_period.note: Waiting period has elapsed. Policy has been in force for 819 days at the incident date.

signals.label: Back-to-Back Claims
signals.reason: No prior claim within 30 days of this incident on this vehicle.

signals.label: Repeat Claimant
signals.reason: Fewer than 3 claims for this member in the preceding 12 months.

signals.label: Claim Shortly After Policy Inception
signals.reason: Incident occurred 819 days after policy inception — outside the 45-day window.

signals.label: No-Claim Bonus Discrepancy
signals.reason: No NCB discrepancy against claims history.

signals.label: Hypothecation Data Mismatch
signals.reason: RC hypothecation field is consistent with the policy register.

signals.label: Driving Licence Class Mismatch
signals.reason: DL authorised classes ('MCWG (Motorcycle with Gear) only') do not appear to cover the insured vehicle's class ('Motor Car (LMV)').

signals.label: Registered Owner Mismatch
signals.reason: Not evaluated — RC owner name and/or FNOL claimant name is not available for comparison.

signals.label: Late Reporting
signals.reason: FNOL received 13 days after the incident date (threshold: 7 days).

signals.label: Narrative Coherence
signals.reason: The claimant states that the vehicle was rear-ended at low speed with no airbag deployment, but the adjuster observation indicates front-end damage and airbag deployment, which contradicts the claimant's account.

signals.label: Key Status Concern (Theft Claims Only)
signals.reason: Not applicable — incident type is not THEFT_COMPLETE.

signals.label: Damage Severity Plausibility
signals.reason: The adjuster observation describes front-end damage and airbag deployment, which are not consistent with the claimant's description of a rear-only, low-speed impact.

fraud_signals.adjuster_summary: 5 of 12 elevated-review indicators are present — Confidence: MODERATE. Recommend referral to SIU for further review. Adjuster to determine next steps.

triggered_conditions.label: Late FNOL — Over 7 Days
triggered_conditions.trigger: FNOL received 13 days after incident date
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Request written explanation from claimant. Refer to senior.

triggered_conditions.label: Elevated Review Indicators
triggered_conditions.adjuster_instruction: Refer to SIU for review. Does not by itself constitute a finding.
